channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: A novel therapy targeting GABA is safe and may be effective in major depressive disorder
item.description: H3-10353, a new GABA positive allosteric modulator, is safe and well-tolerated in healthy patients and those with major depressive disorder.

item.title: Biologics Continue to Revolutionize Psoriasis Care
item.description: Biologic therapies have greatly improved psoriasis treatment, helping patients achieve clearer or clear skin, though concerns about cost, access, and long-term effects remain.

item.title: Cheaper, alternative health plans are having a moment, but critics urge caution
item.description: When Melanie Miller saw her health insurance premium nearly triple to $914 a month, she stopped shopping on the Affordable Care Act marketplace and sought cheaper alternatives.

item.title: Scars of life: Study shows impact of atopic dermatitis on educational and career choices
item.description: Atopic dermatitis, the most common form of eczema, affects patients' life trajectories beyond physical scars. A new study shows that adults with the condition often face educational and career limitations.
